ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider for the patient */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the patient */,
  "annual_household_income" REAL /* Annual household income of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "births" (
  "birth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each birth */,
  "pregnancy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pregnancy associated with the birth */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Weight of the newborn in grams */,
  "birth_length" REAL /* Length of the newborn in centimeters */,
  "apgar_score_1min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 1 minute after birth */,
  "apgar_score_5min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 5 minutes after birth */,
  "apgar_score_10min" INTEGER /* Apgar score at 10 minutes after birth */,
  "head_circumference" REAL /* Head circumference of the newborn */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery (e.g., vaginal, cesarean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("birth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient associated with the health record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of health record (e.g., prenatal visit, postnatal visit, vaccination) */,
  "record_category" TEXT /* Category of health record (e.g., prenatal, postnatal) */,
  "record_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of health record (e.g., routine check-up, illness) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the health record */,
  "record_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the health record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the clinic */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the clinic */,
  "clinic_type" TEXT /* Type of clinic (e.g., hospital, community clinic) */,
  "number_of_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinic the user is associated with */,
  "user_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the user (e.g., obstetrics, pediatrics) */,
  "user_certification" TEXT /* Certification of the user (e.g., board-certified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)
